_comment: Watchlist for strategy-based signal monitoring. Tickers, strategies, and theses are yours to edit. The 'thesis' values are STARTER drafts of common market talking points — review and rewrite to your own view. State persists across runs in watchlist_state.json so flips can be flagged.

IONQ.bull: Pure-play public quantum exposure on trapped-ion architecture; cloud partnerships (AWS Braket, Azure Quantum, Google Cloud) drive early compute-time revenue; ~$2B cash runway extends viability past commercial-utility milestones; recent stack-extending M&A (Lightsynq photonics, Qubitekk networking, Oxford Ionics).
IONQ.bear: Pre-commercial revenue (~$190M TTM on ~$18B mcap = >100× sales); profitability years away; competition from superconducting (IBM, Google) and neutral-atom (QuEra, Atom Computing); narrative-driven; β~3.0 means market drawdowns are amplified.

ONDS.bull: Two-segment exposure — private wireless FullMAX for rail/critical infra + drone autonomy (Airobotics Optimus, American Robotics Scout); defense/border drone tailwinds; recent contract wins in rail and government programs.
ONDS.bear: Persistent dilution history funds ops; revenue still small (~$50M TTM on ~$4B mcap = ~80× sales); contract-announcement-driven volatility; profitability not in sight; small-cap liquidity risk; concentration risk on a handful of programs.
